name: Cholent
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight in a large bowl. Drain and remove any dried-out beans.
2. Sauté onions and garlic in a few tablespoons of water until the onions are translucent.
3. Add barley, beans, and cover with enough water to be at least 2 inches above the ingredients. Bring to a boil and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Add potatoes and tomato sauce, then cook for an additional 30 minutes.
5. Transfer cholent to a crockpot and let it sit overnight, or place in a preheated oven at 200°F (93°C) for 8 hours or overnight.
Serves: 8 - 10
This is EXCELLENT!
